While under the influence of Ebony Cataphract, hit something with Midnight Embrace to shatter the blade.
advancements.ess_requiem.cataphract_ring: Craft the Cataphract Ring, evolving the Ebony Armor spell early.
advancements.ess_requiem.emboldened_ingo: Forge an emboldened ingot by cooking an iron ingot on a campfire, or combining it with magma cream.
advancements.ess_requiem.expertise.title: Maestro of the Blade
advancements.ess_requiem.hope.title: And Dreams
advancements.ess_requiem.nameless_ring.d: Craft the Nameless Ring, unlocking the true power of decaying will.
advancements.ess_requiem.potential.title: Potential Man
advancements.ess_requiem.practice.title: Progress is Progress
advancements.ess_requiem.root.descriptio: An Armada of spells and weaponry
advancements.ess_requiem.root.title: ESS: Requiem
advancements.ess_requiem.scythe_of_froze: Craft the Scythe of Frozen Dreams.
advancements.ess_requiem.scythe_of_rotte: Craft the Scythe of Rotten Dreams.
death.attack.ess_requiem.bone_claw: %1$s was ripped into tiny pieces by %2$s
death.attack.ess_requiem.cataphract_slam: %1$s had their face smashed in by %2$s
death.attack.ess_requiem.decaying_will: %1$s felt the might of %2$s's decaying power
death.attack.ess_requiem.dismantle: %1$s was cut into little pieces by %2$s
death.attack.ess_requiem.hopping_skull: %1$s had their skull bashed in by %2$s's summoned skulls
death.attack.ess_requiem.nights_cover: %1$s ripped to nothingness in the dark by %2$s
death.attack.ess_requiem.skull_mass: %1$s was reduced to a pile of bone meal by %2$s's skull mass
death.attack.ess_requiem.twilight_assaul: %1$s cut in half in the dark by %2$s
death.attack.ess_requiem.uppercut: %1$s was stabbed through the chin by %2$s
item.ess_requiem.arm_of_decay.desc: When below 50% HP, strikes with the scythe call forth a massive army of undead.
item.ess_requiem.arm_of_decay.lore: Granted Divinity, The weapon pulses with its own heartbeat.
item.ess_requiem.cataphract_ring.desc: A thorny red ring imbued with hate. They say the strength you receive from it would allow you to shatter blades even as thick as the Midnight Embrace.
item.ess_requiem.dream_ripper.lore: The Scythe bites with a new edge. Ripping open minds, devouring dreams with an endless hunger.
item.ess_requiem.expertise.lore: The emboldened blade's metal clumped like this is preventing enchanting.
item.ess_requiem.inevitability.desc: When the blade is held, prevents death, albeit, every death weakens your overall abilities.
item.ess_requiem.inevitability.lore: Granted Divinity, The weapon projects the past, present, and future, promising death.
item.ess_requiem.intertwined_peak.desc: The blade is free from shackles of enchantments, it knows it's better than that, and refuses to be enchanted.
item.ess_requiem.intertwined_peak.desc2: Right click the blade, while crouching to split it.
item.ess_requiem.intertwined_peak.desc3: Inflicts Overwhelming Dread. Combo with other blade effects, Skillful Wound, or Shattered Will to cause powerful synergies.
item.ess_requiem.intertwined_peak.lore: Granted Divinity, The weapon is pinnacle of blades, mastery of swordsmanship.
item.ess_requiem.nameless_ring.desc: The ring of an unnamed king. You feel the power of decay within.
item.ess_requiem.silver_ring.desc: A small silver ring. No matter how hard you'll tug, once you put it on, it'll never come off. It feels ominous.
item.ess_requiem.skyfalls_cause.desc: Right click with Skyfall's Cause in one hand, and Swift Demise in the other, while standing, to fuse.
item.ess_requiem.skyfalls_cause.desc2: Inflicts Shattered Will. Combo with other blade effects, Overwhelming Dread or Skillful Wound to cause powerful synergies.
item.ess_requiem.skyfalls_cause.desc3: The blade is free from shackles of enchantments, and refuses to be enchanted.
item.ess_requiem.skyfalls_cause.lore: Half of the peak. The blade twitches near foes, eager to strike them with wroth force.
item.ess_requiem.swift_demise.desc: Right click with Swift Demise in one hand, and Skyfall's Cause in the other, while standing, to fuse
item.ess_requiem.swift_demise.desc2: Inflicts Skillful Wound. Combo with other blade effects, Overwhelming Dread, or Shattered will to cause powerful synergies.
item.ess_requiem.swift_demise.desc3: The blade is free from shackles of enchantments, and refuses to be enchanted.
item.ess_requiem.swift_demise.lore: Half of the peak. The blade seems to ready itself for you, as if it could react faster than you.
spell.ess_requiem.adrenaline_rush.guide: Fuel your body with mana, boosting your adrenal response rapidly for a few moments, then become exhausted upon it wearing off.
spell.ess_requiem.arm_of_decay_insta_rai: Arm of Decay Passive Ability (CREATIVE ONLY)
spell.ess_requiem.bastion_of_light.guide: Become Light itself, attacks phasing through your body like nothing. Although each would be attack spends hefty mana to block, and if you drop below 250 mana, the effect stops working.
spell.ess_requiem.boiling_blood.guide: Boil a targets blood, dealing damage and setting them aflame. Targets with boiled blood find their mana regeneration compromised, and a weakness to blood.
spell.ess_requiem.cleave.guide: Violently slam your sword into the ground, enhanced with magic hatred, deal more damage towards those with extra mana. The shockwave deals half the damage of the sword's downslam. The evolved form of Slam.
spell.ess_requiem.corpse_explosion.guide: Violently explode the body of a summoned creature, obliterating it, and leaving a toxic puddle of blood behind. The Evolved form of Sacrifice
spell.ess_requiem.cursed_immortality.gui: Channel the energy of a totem, albeit mildly warped, spending all of your mana on death to revive you.
spell.ess_requiem.damnation.guide: Charge up a swing, and mark a spherical radius around yourself. Once the windup is complete, hurt everything in the sphere for 1/2 of the main damage, and anything hit by the black flames for the full damage. Entities who get hit are inflicted with damned, making all attacks cost mana.
spell.ess_requiem.decaying_will.guide: Call upon decay itself to rebuild your summons should they fall using mana, as well as summoning an initial burst of powerful withering energy. Tales say a certain ring could stop you from decaying when using this spell. The Evolved form of Necrotic Burst.
spell.ess_requiem.disappearing_act.guide: Send out a poof of smoke, causing you and everything nearby you to be turned invisible.
spell.ess_requiem.dismantle.guide: Tense your muscles with magic, swinging your weapon, and unleashing a wave of furious slashes. The ranged slashes do half the damage of your original swing. The evolved form of Slash.
spell.ess_requiem.ebony_armor.guide: Take on cursed Ebony Plating upon your body, enhancing all your physical aspects to the supreme. However, the plates shackle your spell casting, preventing it in full.
spell.ess_requiem.ebony_cataphract.guide: Take on Ebony Plates filled with hatred upon your body, have your stats enhanced to the extreme. Instead of being able to cast spells, trying to cast spells will cause you to violently lunge forward, damaging what you hit. Trying to 'right click' will cause you to slam the ground violently, sneaking and 'right clicking' causes you to rapidly heal
spell.ess_requiem.eternal_battlefield.gu: Designate a target to fight in the eternal battlefield, creating an area where nothing can die, although reviving is said to drain the soul and disorient the mind.
spell.ess_requiem.finality_of_decay.guid: Unleash a countdown upon a target. Once the countdown reaches zero, the target takes heavy damage, and begins to rot and wither away rapidly.
spell.ess_requiem.forever_dreaming.guide: If an entity is below 25% HP, rip open the invisible bubble of exhaustion, lulling them into a blissful slumber. While sleeping, the dreams and nightmares of entities are vulnerable, but their mortal bodies cannot be harmed.
spell.ess_requiem.glacial_sculpting.guid: Crush a summon with a glacial statue, exploding them, and leaving a frozen statue behind.
spell.ess_requiem.hone_edge.guide: Sharpen the edge of your weapon with magical energy, increasing the damage of your attacks.
spell.ess_requiem.lord_of_the_final_fros: A frozen version of decaying will. They say a frozen Queen of the North created it. Summons who die violently explode in ice.
spell.ess_requiem.necrotic_burst.guide: Release a burst of withering energy, empowered by the souls of the dead, damage and wither things around you in a radius.
spell.ess_requiem.nightmare.guide: Once a target is wrapped in sleep, summon a nightmare to hunt them down. Nightmare's copy the stats of what's being targeted.
spell.ess_requiem.nights_cover.guide: Can only be cast at night. Mark multiple targets to be struck by pale flames, and beat by tentacles. When target are struck, emit a smokescreen and gain invisibility, for a short while after, all attacks dealt while under true invisibility deal 2.5x damage. The Evolved form of Twilight Assault
spell.ess_requiem.overwhelming_force.gui: Swing your weapon with catastrophic strength, tearing your muscle fibers making you more vulnerable to damage, whilst stunning whatever it hits.
spell.ess_requiem.overwhelming_light.gui: Overwhelm targets with light, striking multiple targets down with powerful sunbeams, and chasing them down with powerful wisps. Can only be cast during the day.
spell.ess_requiem.pact_of_the_dead.guide: A vile pact with an undead long dead. During the night, imbue your attacks with a violent and powerful rampage, and during the day, wither and burn for your atrocities.
spell.ess_requiem.pale_flame.guide: A flame pure of all animosity, allows the user to channel their pain and rage into a swing, and receive the care of the pale flame. When below 40% HP doubles current flame damage, and on successful hit, gain abyssal shroud for a short time.
spell.ess_requiem.place_standard.guide: Place a sentient battle standard. The standard will fight, either by unleashing a wave, slashing all caught by it, summoning golden swords to fight for it. Summoning the standard grants a shield which blocks one counterspell, as well as granting one extra damage.
spell.ess_requiem.protection_of_the_fall: Call upon ancient spirits to protect you from harm. Uses mana to reduce oncoming damage, and retaliates against attackers using sharp purple spikes.
spell.ess_requiem.quick_slice.guide: Choose a target, instantly teleport to them, slashing them to do damage.
spell.ess_requiem.reaper.guide: Temporarily become a reaper, when your summons perish, harvest their souls to regain mana.
spell.ess_requiem.rip_and_tear.guide: Enhance one of your arms, allowing fingers to become razor sharp claws, and while under a rampage, the souls of the dead fill your claws with strength. Your claws will not come out if there is an item in the way.
spell.ess_requiem.slam.guide: Slam the ground violently with your weapon, sending a small shockwave off impact. Strike close for hitting things with your actual blade on the downswing does additional damage.
spell.ess_requiem.slash.guide: Tense your muscles with magic, and swing your weapon with enhanced strength.
spell.ess_requiem.soulmaster_summon.guid: Summon a magical sword. The sword's damage matches the weapon in your hand's damage when you summon it.
spell.ess_requiem.spikes_of_agony.guide: Unleash a wave of Eldritch energy, whatever the wave hits, stab with an eldritch spike, dealing damage.
spell.ess_requiem.strain.guide: Strain your muscles, pushing your body to it's limit to enhance blood spell power. Power is not without cost, and you lose max HP casting this spell.
spell.ess_requiem.summon_skulls.guide: Summon Cursed Skulls from nothingness that will cast spells at your foes. The skulls aren't the best at holding themselves up with magic, and will fall or drag themselves across the ground on occasion. While under a rampage, summon a singular, high flying, stronger skull.
spell.ess_requiem.switcharoo.guide: Switch health with a target, you can only switch with anything with less max hp than the health limit.
spell.ess_requiem.sword_stance.guide: Take a defensive stance, with perfect timing block any attack, and reflect all projectiles.
spell.ess_requiem.tentacle_whip.guide: Send forth a singular tentacle to tear from the ground and whip a target, dealing damage.
spell.ess_requiem.twilight_assault.guide: Mark targets, once all targets are marked, cloak yourself in invisibility and strike.
spell.ess_requiem.undying_dread.guide: Strengthen the will of your soul, if you are killed when your soul is strengthened, delay your death by 2 minutes, while also gaining immense strength. Once those 2 minutes are up, instantly die.
spell.ess_requiem.uppercut.guide: Swing your weapon upward, anything hit by this gets flung backward into the air.
spell.ess_requiem.wretch.guide: Spew magical blood forth from your body, dealing damage. When low HP, switch damage to Desperation Damage, doing more damage.
ui.enders_spells.marked_for_decay: You've been marked for decay, rid yourself of the effect or suffer.
ui.enders_spells.not_empty_hand: You try and flex your claws, yet something's in the way.
